summary: Frontend-only regression on new auth UI (Login, SignUp, ForgotPassword, ProfileDropdown). All 14 targeted checks passed: profile dropdown renders correct menu items based on logged-in/out state, login/signup/logout flows update the AuthContext + persist to localStorage, password toggle works, password-strength meter transitions through Too weak → Weak → Strong → Excellent, mismatched-password signup is blocked with a toast, forgot-password shows success block, theme toggle works on auth pages, and /analyze onboarding still renders with the added ProfileDropdown.
passed: Landing has hero-title + start-analysis-btn + profile-dropdown-trigger + theme-toggle
Logged-out dropdown shows only menu-login & menu-signup (no profile/dashboard/settings/logout)
menu-login navigates to /login and login-page renders
Login page exposes login-email, login-password, toggle-password, remember-me, link-forgot-password, login-submit, google-login, link-to-signup
Valid login redirects to / and dropdown now exposes menu-profile/menu-dashboard/menu-settings/menu-logout + profile-avatar with initials
menu-logout clears user; dropdown returns to Login/Sign Up
password-strength meter labels change with input strength (Too weak → Weak → Strong → Excellent)
Signup with mismatched passwords stays on /signup and shows 'Passwords do not match' toast
Signup with matching strong password redirects to / and shows avatar
ForgotPassword: forgot-email + forgot-submit + link-back-login; after submit forgot-success + forgot-back-btn appear
Theme toggle works on /login (html class dark ↔ light)
/analyze onboarding still renders with the added ProfileDropdown
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext is intentionally a client-only mock (localStorage under 'fp-auth-user'); no server call. Fine for the UI-only scope, but before wiring Firebase remember to (a) validate email format & password rules server-side, (b) never trust stored user object as auth truth, (c) rotate STORAGE_KEY or migrate on schema change.
Login/SignUp accept any email+password combination (no validation beyond non-empty and strength≥2). Acceptable for the mocked scope but should be enforced once Firebase is added.
Consider adding aria-live to the strength label so screen readers announce transitions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth UI testIds are stable and match the review request exactly. Auth is a client-only mock via AuthContext (localStorage key 'fp-auth-user'). When Firebase is wired later, re-run these flows plus new validation error paths (bad email, weak password from server side, network failure).
